name: acl-missing-commands
title: Grant ACL permissions for provider-draft and git commands
description: 22 registered Tauri commands (5 provider discovery/draft + 17 git) are absent from every ACL permission set, so invoking them fails with 'not allowed by ACL' (e.g. create_provider_draft on Check connection). Add them to permission sets and wire the capability.
creator: tseka
